User.title: User
User.description: Store the user public profile and current cycle configuration

photoURL.description: URL of the user profile image

Workout.title: Workout
Workout.description: Logged workout session containing exercises and sets performance metrics

startTime.description: Epoch millisecond timestamp of workout launch

endTime.description: Epoch millisecond timestamp of workout completion

comments.description: User comments or notes about the session

cycleWeek.description: The specific cycle week this workout falls into

exercises.description: Ordered list of exercises completed with sets performance

Routine.title: Routine
Routine.description: Predefined workout routine schemas serving as instant templates

exercises.description: Predefined default reps, sets arrangement and rest preferences

WeightEntry.title: WeightEntry
WeightEntry.description: Individual weight measurements tracked over time

timestamp.description: Epoch millisecond timestamp of tracking instant

/users/{userId}/history/{workoutId}.description: Historic log logs belonging to specific athlete

/users/{userId}/routines/{routineId}.description: Custom templates for training workout loops
